dispositions.name: Call Outcome
dispositions.question: What was the outcome of the call?

objective_options.condition: Customer expressed genuine interest and agreed to a next step
Customer asked to be contacted later, no specific date
Reached someone who is not the intended recipient

dispositions.name: Customer Sentiment
dispositions.question: What was the overall sentiment of the customer during the call?

objective_options.condition: Customer was friendly, engaged, and cooperative
Customer was irritated, dismissive, or hostile

dispositions.name: Budget Mentioned
dispositions.question: Did the customer mention a budget? Capture the numeric value if stated.

dispositions.name: Decision Maker
dispositions.question: Is the person on the call the decision-maker or do they need to involve others?

objective_options.condition: Customer is the final decision-maker for this purchase
Customer is involved but needs to consult others
Customer cannot decide; they will forward to the decision-maker

dispositions.name: Handover Needed
dispositions.question: Does this conversation require handover to a human agent? Look for explicit requests, complex technical issues, escalations, or repeated misunderstandings.

objective_options.condition: One of the handover triggers is satisfied (explicit request, escalation, complaint, repeated confusion, legal/compliance issue)
None of the handover triggers were satisfied; the agent handled the conversation end-to-end

dispositions.name: Customer Email
dispositions.question: Did the customer provide their email address during the call? Capture the email if they did.
